message:
feat(compile): add universal compiler with native/WASM/browser targets

- Add universal_compiler.zig: compiles JS to native or WASM binaries
- Add native_main_static.zig: native entry point with embedded bytecode
- Add wasm_main_standalone.zig: standalone WASI WASM (no WAMR dependency)
- Add browser WASM target with minimal WASI shim
- Implement inject_hooks for freeze optimization in compiled binaries

Build targets:
- zig build native-static -Dbytecode=... -> native binary
- zig build wasm-standalone -Dbytecode=... -> WASI WASM
- zig build wasm-browser -Dbytecode=... -> browser bundle
